zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：弱势震荡偏空延续
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD处于弱势震荡偏空结构，价格运行在1686附近徘徊，反弹动能不足，整体仍受均线压制，空头结构未明显扭转，短线反弹多为修正行情偏弱

MACD指标维持负值且动能柱扩张，空头动能仍占优势；均线系统下方运行，短期趋势偏弱延续RSI缺失但价格弱势结构明显缺乏上行动力整体偏空

下方关键支撑位关注1677一线，若跌破可能下探1650区域；上方阻力位1730及1750附近，突破需量能配合否则难以延续涨势受压

操作建议以反弹做空为主，等待价格回测1700-1730区间承压信号，严格设置止损防止假突破风险控制仓位并顺势交易谨慎为主执行纪律

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading in a tight consolidation near 1686, reflecting indecision after recent directional attempts. Price action remains capped below the 20-day SMA while holding marginal gains above recent intraday lows. This positioning suggests a fragile equilibrium where sellers retain slight control, but volatility compression indicates an imminent expansion. Overall structure leans mildly bearish unless price reclaims higher moving averages with conviction.

Ethereum’s momentum indicators point to weakening bullish pressure, with MACD reading negative at -18.15, reinforcing downside bias. The absence of an RSI reading limits overbought or oversold confirmation, but price action below the 20-day SMA at 1732.42 supports a bearish short-term outlook. Lack of signal line data reduces precision, yet overall momentum still favors sellers unless a reversal in trend strength emerges soon.

Ethereum currently finds immediate support near the recent intraday low around 1677, with a break below potentially exposing the 1650 psychological zone and deeper liquidity near 1600. On the upside, initial resistance is located at the 20-day SMA around 1732, followed by a stronger supply zone between 1750 and 1780. Price remains range-bound, and breakout confirmation is required for directional continuation in the near term market structure remains compressed.

Traders may consider a cautious range-trading approach given the current compression between support at 1677 and resistance at 1732. Short positions may be favored near the 20-day SMA with tight risk management above 1750, while scalpers could target rebounds toward 1650 support. A confirmed breakout above resistance would shift bias toward recovery, whereas a breakdown below 1677 may accelerate downside momentum toward lower liquidity zones.
